articles.title: DeSantis announces plans to use new state law to target dozens of alleged terrorist groups
articles.summary: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis designated more than 90 groups as terrorist organizations under a new state law, including CAIR, Muslim Brotherhood and Antifa.

articles.title: Mexican national sentenced in border child smuggling case involving THC-laced candy
articles.summary: A Mexican national was sentenced to five years in federal prison for a human smuggling scheme that used THC candy to sedate children as young as 5 years old.

articles.summary: Arlington, Virginia police officer Vincent Baglio allegedly assaulted someone he knew while off duty and now faces a malicious wounding charge.

articles.title: USA advances in World Cup after controversial red card vs Bosnia and Herzegovina

articles.summary: LA Dodgers gave $1.1 million in 2026 to California Community Foundation and Labor Community Services after immigration raids hit Los Angeles last year.

articles.summary: Climbing rangers hiked up Mount Shasta on foot after cloud cover blocked a direct helicopter rescue of a woman who slid 1,500 feet down Avalanche Gulch.
